summary: Excellent audience recording with upfront, full‑left sound and a standout moment when Jerry sings “Comes A Time”.
review: Both reviewers rave about the fat, upfront stereo image of this audience capture – left channel noticeably fuller, likely recorded near Phil’s side. The performance shines especially on Jerry’s vocal rendition of “Comes A Time”, which drew an enthusiastic crowd reaction.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews highlight superb sound quality and a memorable vocal moment, giving the recording a solid rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Upfront, fat stereo image; left channel fuller than right, suggesting placement near Phil's side of stage. Captures clear crowd reaction and strong instrument separation.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; focus is on the highlighted vocal moment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocal entry on “Comes A Time” generated a notable crowd reaction and was praised by reviewers.
